description_short: AI-powered threat investigation and SOC analyst workflows.
description_long: Deep-dive security investigation tool that combines log evidence with LLM-powered threat intelligence analysis. Supports two modes: (1) investigate mode for targeted analysis of a search term (IP, user, error) with threat assessment, MITRE ATT&CK mapping, and recommended actions, and (2) workflow mode for predefined SOC analyst workflows like top_talkers, investigate_ip, security_events, and attack_patterns. Requires LLM connection for full investigation capabilities.
author: Event Mill Contributors
